response.overview: A major tennis tournament is about to begin, and the tension is palpable. On the court, two ball girls crouch on either side of the net. Each believes her moment has arrived. They want to be the best ball girls in the tournament's history. The ultimate ball girl championship.  But when the match begins and the girls look into each other's eyes, they are surprised to discover another force beyond the net: attraction. A dynamic that begins as bitter rivalry transforms into a magnetic passion, during which the girls search for a way to escape the competition that stands in the way of their love.
response.title: 2:LOVE
